title: Executive Order 5820—Revocation of Withdrawal of Public Lands Pending Resurvey, Arkansas
text:
It is hereby ordered that Executive Order No. 5116, dated May 15, 1929, which withdrew the public lands in T. 1 N., R. 26 W., fifth principal meridian, Arkansas, pending resurvey, be, and the same is hereby, revoked.
All the lands in this township are included in the Ouachita National Forest.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
March 16, 1932.
